home.title: LapCoach — Your Coach on Track
home.description: Free lap timer app for cars and motorcycles on track. 20Hz GPS with the optional LapCoach device, or standalone with your phone GPS. iOS and Android.

app.title: LapCoach App — GPS Lap Timer
app.description: iOS and Android app for professional lap timing. 20Hz GPS, AI Coach, post-session analysis. Free.

shop.title: Beta Access — LapCoach One
shop.description: Request beta access to the LapCoach One device. Professional 20Hz GPS for track days. Limited spots.

footer.description: GPS lap timer for cars and motorcycles on track. Free app, optional device for professional 20Hz GPS.

hero.label: GPS Lap Timer for Cars and Motorcycles
hero.description: Free app for iOS and Android. Use it right away with your phone GPS, or pair it with the LapCoach device for professional 20Hz GPS and maximum precision.

gps.label: Absolute precision
gps.title: GPS 20Hz
gps.body: The u-blox M10 module samples position 20 times per second, guaranteeing 50ms temporal resolution per lap — more than enough to distinguish hundredths of a second between sessions.

ble.label: Instant connection
ble.title: BLE Real-Time
ble.body: Bluetooth Low Energy 5.0 ensures minimum latency and a stable connection even under vibration conditions. GPS data flows to the app in real time: speed, position, split times.

ai.label: Intelligent analysis
ai.title: AI Coach
ai.body: At the end of each session, the AI analyses your laps and identifies where you are losing time: late braking, non-optimal trajectories, wrong apex points. Concrete feedback, not just numbers.

video.label: Premium
video.title: Video + Telemetry
video.body: Record your session and replay it with a fully synchronized telemetry HUD: speed, lap time, delta — and a mini-map tracking your position on circuit in real time.

accel.label: Accel Timer
accel.title: 0–100 & ¼ Mile
accel.body: Dedicated acceleration timer with automatic launch detection. Milestones at 60, 100 and 200 km/h, plus quarter mile (402 m) with speed at crossing.

mapHeatmap.label: Post-session
mapHeatmap.title: Speed Heatmap
mapHeatmap.body: Every lap visualised on the map with speed-coded colour. Braking zones are detected and marked with entry and exit speeds. Toggle the best lap overlay to compare.

voice.label: Hands-free
voice.title: Voice Announcements
voice.body: After each lap and sector, the app reads your time and delta aloud. Hands on the wheel, eyes on the track — no need to look at the screen.

steps.title: Mount LapCoach
steps.body: Fix the device on the handlebar or tail with velcro or zip ties. No wiring, no hardware configuration.

steps.title: Connect via Bluetooth
steps.body: Open the app, press connect. The device is detected automatically. The BLE connection remains stable even while riding.

steps.title: Analyse in real time
steps.body: During the session you see laps, speed and splits live. After the day, the AI processes the data and provides you with the briefing.

device.label: The device
device.title: LapCoach One
device.description: Professional 20Hz GPS. In private beta — invite-only access for the first track day enthusiasts.

download.label: Free app
download.title: Available on
download.description: Download the app for free. Works right away with your phone GPS. Pair it with the LapCoach device for professional performance.

items.a: Fill in the request form. We evaluate each application based on the usage profile and will contact the selected candidates within 48 hours. Beta testers receive the device at a special price in exchange for structured feedback.

items.q: Do I need the device to use the app?
items.a: No. The app works with your phone's built-in GPS. The LapCoach device significantly improves accuracy by raising the GPS frequency from ~1Hz to 20Hz — the difference between ~5m and less than 1m of positional accuracy.

items.q: Which cars and motorcycles are supported?
items.a: LapCoach works with any vehicle. It requires no electrical installation — it mounts with velcro or zip ties in any position.
91 tracks preloaded worldwide — Italy, Europe and beyond. More are added with every update. And if your track is missing, you can add it manually directly from the app.

items.q: How is the device firmware updated?
items.a: Via the app over direct WiFi — no computer needed. The app notifies you automatically when an update is available.
We currently ship to Italy. Free shipping above €59.

waitlist.label: Notifications
waitlist.title: Want to know when LapCoach is available?
waitlist.description: Leave your email — we'll notify you at launch. Zero spam.
waitlist.successBody: You'll receive an email as soon as LapCoach is available.

hero.label: iOS & Android App
hero.description: Real-time GPS data, AI post-session analysis, millisecond-accurate lap timer. Works with the LapCoach One device via Bluetooth or standalone with your phone GPS.

items.title: Precise timer
items.body: Lap times updated in real time at 20Hz. Millisecond resolution. Live delta vs best lap per track position.

items.title: Best lap tracking
items.body: The app compares every lap with the best time of the session.

items.title: Sector analysis
items.body: Automatic S1/S2/S3 splits with delta vs best lap per sector. Theoretical Best Lap: sum of your best individual sectors.

items.title: Speed & data
items.body: Instantaneous and maximum. Speed labels on track.

items.title: AI Coach
items.body: Post-session analysis with automatic identification of critical sectors. Also analyse single laps in depth.

items.title: Video + Telemetry
items.body: Record laps and replay with synchronized HUD: speed, delta and mini-map overlaid on video.

items.title: BLE device sync
items.body: Automatic connection to the LapCoach One via Bluetooth Low Energy 5.0.

items.title: Circuit detection
items.body: Automatically recognises the circuit at session start. 91 preloaded tracks worldwide + custom.

items.title: Accel timer
items.body: Automatic launch detection. Milestones: 0–60, 0–100, 0–200 km/h and quarter mile (402 m).

items.title: Voice announcements
items.body: Lap time and delta read aloud after each lap and sector. Hands-free — no need to glance at the screen.

items.title: Speed heatmap
items.body: Post-session map with colour-coded speed. Braking zones and marks them with entry/exit speeds.

items.title: Session history
items.body: Full log of every session: best lap, top speed, lap list, sectors. Export NDJSON for external analysis.

screenshots.label: Screenshots
screenshots.title: Designed for the track
screenshots.description: High-contrast UI, readable even with the visor down and in direct sunlight.
